basic_details.job_title: BSAH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Hospital and Medical College (Govt. of NCT of Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Hospital and Medical College (BSAH) has published the Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 15 Junior Resident (MBBS) positions on an ad-hoc basis. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding an MCI-recognized MBBS degree or an equivalent qualification from a foreign university are eligible to apply online at the official website https://health.delhi.gov.in/. The online application process is open up to 02 July 2026, and the walk-in interview is scheduled for 06 July 2026. Candidates can easily access th

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: MCI recognized MBBS or equivalent (from foreign university)
qualification.details: MCI recognized MBBS or equivalent (from foreign university)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per 7th CPC guidelines as adopted by GNCT of Delhi
salary_details.details: As per 7th CPC guidelines as adopted by GNCT of Delhi

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BSAH to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BSAH Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last date for online application form

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BSAH to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment is 02-07-2026. Candidates are urged to apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position at Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Hospital and Medical College.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post is an MCI recognized MBBS degree or an equivalent qualification from a foreign university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BSAH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts will involve an Interview, followed by Document Verification, and finally the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts will be as per the 7th CPC guidelines, as adopted by the Government of NCT of Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of this job? Is it permanent?
faq.answer: This is an Ad-hoc job recruitment. The tenure and further details regarding the nature of the appointment should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What are the interview dates for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The interviews are scheduled for 06-07-2026 for candidates whose names start with initials A to M, and for candidates whose names start with initials N to Z, the interview will be held on 07-07-2026.
